query:
-- Check how many messages still have NULL waConversationId
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN waConversationId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'SET' END as has_conv_id,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM messages
GROUP BY has_conv_id;

-- Check [Template] conversations again
SELECT wc.id, wc.lastMessagePreview, wc.lastMessageAt,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id) AS msg_count,
  (SELECT m2.content FROM messages m2 WHERE m2.waConversationId = wc.id ORDER BY m2.timestamp DESC, m2.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS true_latest_content,
  (SELECT m3.timestamp FROM messages m3 WHERE m3.waConversationId = wc.id ORDER BY m3.timestamp DESC, m3.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS true_latest_timestamp
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.lastMessagePreview LIKE '%Template%'
LIMIT 5;

SELECT

  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM messages

-- Check [Template] conversations again
SELECT wc.id, wc.lastMessagePreview, wc.lastMessageAt,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id) AS msg_count,
  (SELECT m2.content FROM messages m2 WHERE m2.waConversationId = wc.id ORDER BY m2.timestamp DESC, m2.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS true_latest_content,
  (SELECT m3.timestamp FROM messages m3 WHERE m3.waConversationId = wc.id ORDER BY m3.timestamp DESC, m3.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS true_latest_timestamp
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.lastMessagePreview LIKE '%Template%'
LIMIT 5;
